title: The Unshakable Believer: Standing Firm When the World Judges
description:
Holding Onto Your Faith in a Judgmental World (The Great Reversal) 📌 Note to viewers: While we are blessed to live alongside an open-minded and respectful majority in the West, this lecture addresses the specific moments when that tolerance breaks down—not only among hostile non-Muslims but equally among Muslim families and communities themselves. The Quran does not analyze hostility to breed negativity; it does so to validate the quiet struggles of believers and to provide an unshakeable blueprint for psychological resilience. 
This video explores the divine psychology of social pressure as mapped out in the Quran. In this deep dive into Surat Al-Mutaffifin, we break down the exact psychological warfare faced by practicing Muslims navigating secular spaces today. From social media mockery to workplace or university isolation, discover how Allah validates the pain of the lonely believer, exposes the toxic insecurity of the mocker, and perfectly reverses the cosmic scales so that final triumph belongs to those who refuse to bow to social pressure. 
If you found value in this reminder, please Like, Subscribe, and Share this video to support the channel and help spread the message of unshakable faith

00:00 Introduction
00:12 The Reality of Mockery
06:15 Anatomy of the Mockers
10:13 The Mob Mentality
18:42 The Roots of Islamophobia
23:52 The Cosmic Reversal
27:16 The Value of the Believer
31:09 Theological Clarifications
39:58 Rejecting the Myth of Safety
43:55 Choosing Heat Over Shade
47:23 Dealing with a Tight Chest
50:57 Beautiful Avoidance
54:04 The Story of Sa'd (RA)
58:51 Final Advice
1:02:29 Addressing Questions

==============================================

title: Here are 2 duas to attract more rizq:  اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلاَلِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي
description:
Here are 2 duas to attract more rizq:

اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلاَلِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
Allahummakfini bihalalika an haramika, wa aghnini bifadlika ‘amman siwaak.
"O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful, and enrich me with Your bounty from anyone besides You."

رَبِّ إِنِّى لِمَآ أَنزَلْتَ إِلَىَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍۢ فَقِيرٌۭ
Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khairin faqir.
“My Lord, I am truly in great need of any good that You might send down to me."

title: Boonaa Mohammed x Sh. Belal Assaad
description:
In this video, I sat with my dear brother Boonaa Mohammed to share some of my lifelong journey with the Quran and how it became my greatest source of guidance, comfort and healing through both life's joys and its deepest trials.

1:31 Early Quranic Memories
2:35 Learning Through Stories
7:15 The Quran as a Friend
